Parses.Sparql:
PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?x
WHERE {
FILTER (?x != ns:m.03_r3)
FILTER (!isLiteral(?x) OR lang(?x) = '' OR langMatches(lang(?x), 'en'))
ns:m.03_r3 ns:location.country.languages_spoken ?x .
}

PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?x
WHERE {
FILTER (?x != ns:m.03_r3)
FILTER (!isLiteral(?x) OR lang(?x) = '' OR langMatches(lang(?x), 'en'))
ns:m.03_r3 ns:location.country.official_language ?x .
}

Questions.RawQuestion: what did james k polk do before he was president?
Questions.ProcessedQuestion: what did james k polk do before he was president

AnnotatorComment.FreeFormComment: !Manual Sparql. Comment: Done.  Assuming the question is about the government positions before President.. Original comment: F cannot handle before

Answers.EntityName: Speaker of the United States House of Representatives
